reasoning: The chart fails to answer the primary part of the business question ('Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup...'), which asks for the total revenue figures for the years 2021-2024. Instead, it displays monthly revenue data overlaid on top of each other. This makes it impossible for a user to quickly read or compare the annual totals (e.g., ~236k for 2021 vs ~1.2M for 2022) without performing manual calculations. While the line chart shows trends within months, it obscures the aggregate yearly performance requested by the prompt. A bar chart showing annual sums would be significantly more appropriate.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a column/bar chart where the x-axis represents the Year (2021-2024) and the y-axis represents the Sum of Revenue ([Umsatz SD/CO]) aggregated by year.
